name: 20"x30" Modern Tufted Stripe Bath Rug Yellow/Cream - Threshold™
description:
Give your bathroom a welcome touch of stylish texture with this Modern Tufted Stripe Bath Rug from Threshold™. The tufted bath rug is crafted from cotton fabric to provide soft comfort underfoot as you step out of the bath or shower. Designed in a cream hue with yellow stripes, you can place it by the tub or in front of the sink to bring style and convenient comfort to your bath space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
